amendment.description: To clarify the provision of excess spare parts to the Commission.

vote.text: Amendment SA 5437 agreed to in Senate by Unanimous Consent.

action.text: Amendment SA 5437 proposed by Senator Lummis for Senator Scott FL.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 5437 proposed by Senator Lummis for Senator Scott FL.
Senate amendment agreed to: Amendment SA 5437 agreed to in Senate by Unanimous Consent.
